text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While passing through the busy area in front of
the station...

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Sob... Mommy... Where are you?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
What's the matter? Did you get separated from
your mom?

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Worry not! We'll find her for you at once!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Hey, is anyone this girl's mommy?! Anyoooone?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the determined calls, no one steps out
from the bustling crowd to answer their pleas...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Oh, I've got it! ♪ Sorry, I'm just going to
lift you up for a bit!

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Up you go! So, can you see your mom from up
there?

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: ...Oh! I can! She's near the karaoke sign!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The lady in the white outfit! Oh no, she's heading
away from us!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Phew... We found your mom, but moving through
this crowd is going to be tough...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Which means you're up, Biko!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Leave it to me! I'll fetch your mom right over!
Bono, you provide backup via your comms
device!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Call you with updates, right? ♪ Gotcha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biko Pegasus makes deft use of her small frame to
weave swiftly through the large crowd.

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: She's so fast!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hello? Biko? The girl's mom is currently moving
toward the beef bowl restaurant!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Keep going straight! That's her! The lady with the
long black hair and white clothes!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hooray! Biko finally caught up with your mom!

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Yay! Mommy!

text_block_list.name: Young Girl's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much! I don't know what I would've
done without your help.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: It was nothing! You're very welcome.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Isn't it great that we found your mom?

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Thank you both! Bye-bye!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The girl and her mom smile and wave as they
leave.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Hm? You saw us teaming up?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: It's all thanks to Biko chasing after the girl's mom.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
But I couldn't have found her without your help
tracking her, Bono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hehe, we make a pretty good duo!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
For sure! It was so cool how you weaved your way
through that crowd!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
You too, Bono! You were like a hero giving me
orders from our tactical base!
